# Ring of Free Action

- **Type**: RG|XDMG

While you wear this ring, [[difficult_terrain Terrain]] doesn't cost you extra movement. In addition, magic can neither reduce any of your Speeds nor cause you to have the [[paralyzed]] or [[restrained]] condition.
